html:
2026-0329
2026-04-16CIRNACAnishinabek Nation Education Agreement ActOrder Consenting to the Amendments of the Anishinabek Nation Education AgreementOrder consenting to the amendments of the Anishinabek Nation Education Agreement as set out in the Schedule, in order to enable Anishinabek Nation First Nations who have not yet joined the Education Agreement ("new joiners") to utilize community-based approval processes for ratification to be added as a Party to the Education Agreement post-Effective Date.N/A
subject: Order Consenting to the Amendments of the Anishinabek Nation Education Agreement
precis: Order consenting to the amendments of the Anishinabek Nation Education Agreement as set out in the Schedule, in order to enable Anishinabek Nation First Nations who have not yet joined the Education Agreement ("new joiners") to utilize community-based approval processes for ratification to be added as a Party to the Education Agreement post-Effective Date.
